description: Run a Microsoft Azure CLI (`az`) command with auth-context awareness and operation-class detection. Refuses destructive commands unless dryRun=false is explicit.

inputs.name: args
inputs.description: argv tail to pass to az, e.g. ["vm", "list"]. The literal `az` is prepended by the skill.

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.description: If true (default), classifies + reports the command without executing. Set false to actually run.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.description: Hard cap on the az call.

outputs.name: authenticated
outputs.description: True iff `az account show` returned an active subscription.

outputs.name: subscription
outputs.description: Name of the active subscription, or empty.
